name: avenue_behavior_split_v2
description: Training-focused hold-out split for Avenue behavior modeling. All currently identifiable running-support sequences are assigned to train; test remains a strict hold-out for final anomaly evaluation.
notes: This split prioritizes sufficient running-positive support in train.
The hold-out test set remains untouched during pseudo-label generation and model fitting.
Test sequences are anomaly-only evaluation sequences and may under-represent running-specific cases.
